title: HELIUM COMEDY: In The Other Room — Good Cop / Rad Cop (Netflix)
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Sketch/alt comedy duo from Netflix — closer to 'show' than 'stand-up,' which makes it a great low-pressure date where you don't have to be 'on'.

title: Paula Poundstone at Buckhead Theatre
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd NE, Atlanta, GA
price: Ticketed (see Live Nation; upgrades for lounge/bottomless popcorn)
description: Living-legend observational comedian at a sit-down Buckhead theatre. Date-night classic: dinner in Buckhead, then laugh for 90 minutes.

title: Vinyl Sessions: June Edition — Listening Night
location: Marcus Bar & Grille, Atlanta, GA
description: Curated vinyl-DJ listening night — quiet enough to actually talk, musical enough to feel like a 'thing.' Built for a real-conversation date.

title: Afrobeats to the World — Atlanta
location: Atlanta, GA (venue on ATTW site)
description: 18+ Afrobeats party night — DJs, dancefloor, international crowd. Late, loud, and exactly the 'wear something cute, lose your voice' kind of Friday.

title: First Friday at First "LIVE" — Rod Harris, Jr.
location: First "LIVE" venue, Atlanta, GA (see Eventbrite)
description: Intimate live-jazz series kickoff — sax-led trio in a small room. The kind of Friday that starts with wine and ends with a new favorite song.

title: SOLARA: Return to the Light — 404 Found ATL
location: Binders Art Supplies and Frames, Buckhead, Atlanta, GA
description: Afternoon art-marker opening in Buckhead — easy to walk, look, and turn into dinner + drinks. Built for a 'first real date' that doesn't try too hard.

title: Rum Punch Fest — Reggae on the Rooftop (4th of July Weekend)
location: AIR Rooftop / Atlanta rooftop venue, Atlanta, GA
description: Independence Day reggae rooftop with rum punch and skyline views. Fireworks + Caribbean food + dancing = the loudest, easiest 4th-of-July date in town.

title: Noah Kahan — The Great Divide Tour
location: Truist Park, 755 Battery Ave SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Big-stadium folk-pop night at The Battery — pair with a Battery pre-dinner stroll for a full Friday date.

title: Neyo & Akon — Nights Like This Tour 2026
location: Lakewood Amphitheatre, 2002 Lakewood Way SE, Atlanta, GA
description: Two R&B heavyweights in one night — outdoor amphitheater, sing-every-word energy. Date that turns into a group hug by the second chorus.

title: Harry Connick Jr. at Chastain Park
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park, 4469 Stella Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: New-Orleans swing + piano under the stars at Chastain. Picnic, blanket, bottle of wine — the textbook romantic Atlanta summer date.

title: Art In The Beltline (Woodruff Park)
location: Woodruff Park, 91 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Outdoor art fair in the heart of downtown — wander between booths, grab lunch, hop a streetcar. Free, flexible, and turns into a whole Saturday.

title: ATL Vegan Festival — Piedmont Park
location: Piedmont Park, 1332 Monroe Dr NE, Atlanta, GA
description: All-vegan food fest in the park — tastings, vendors, and zero 'wait, does this have meat?' anxiety. Couples who want to graze, chat, and eat plant-based all afternoon.

title: Life Space Vegan Chef Cook-Off
location: 294 Hamilton E Holmes Dr NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Live vegan chef battle — pick a favorite chef, taste everything, argue about who's winning. Weirdly competitive in the best way for couples.

title: Poetic Jazz — Prince Tribute at The Vick at Healey
location: The Vick at Healey, 57 Forsyth St NW #49, Atlanta, GA
description: Jazz re-imagining of Prince's catalog in a downtown listening room. Date-night cheat code: 'I know a Prince-tribute jazz thing' lands every time.

title: Karlous Miller at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Karlous Miller (Wild 'N Out, comedy specials) — high-energy crowd work that doubles as a couples laugh-therapy session. Pair with dinner in Alpharetta.

title: Big Jam (BYOB) at CLTV Studio
location: CLTV Studio, Atlanta, GA
description: Open-mic jam session — BYOB keeps it cheap, the live musicians keep it interesting. Best for the couple whose date involves 'let's just see what happens.'

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing A Song All Night Long
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA
description: Two legacy acts, one arena, all the slow-dance songs from your parents' wedding playlist. Anniversary-grade date — book early.

title: Bubba Dub at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Bubba Dub — viral, crowd-first Southern comedy. Loud enough to kill awkward silences, light enough that you won't argue about whether it was 'too much.'

title: Salsa at Politan Row (Colony Square)
location: Politan Row at Colony Square, 1197 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Salsa + bachata lessons, then open social dancing in a food-hall courtyard. Tacos + margaritas + dancing = a 4-hour date with no planning required.

title: Singer Jazz McKenzie (from The Voice) — Perfect Note Atlanta
location: Perfect Note Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: Dinner-and-a-show format with a Voice alum. Easy Saturday date: dinner at the venue, live set, home by 11.

title: Austin's Saturday Jazz Night at Serenbe
location: Austin's at Serenbe, 9110 Selborne Ln Ste 120, Chattahoochee Hills, GA
description: Late-jazz set 30 minutes south of the city — drive in together, eat at Serenbe, then sit for live jazz. Mini-getaway date energy without the hotel bill.

title: James "Murr" Murray (Impractical Jokers) at Helium
location: Helium Comedy Club, 10 North Hwy N, Alpharetta, GA
description: Murr from Impractical Jokers — improv-heavy, audience-involved, and built for the couple who watches TV together and wants to see how he does it live.

title: Try To Remember Something Too Important to Forget — Day and Night Projects
location: Atlanta Center for Photography — Day and Night Projects, Atlanta, GA
description: Emerging-artist photography cohort — four Atlanta voices, one quiet room. Low-pressure, free, and basically asks to be paired with a coffee date after.

title: This Is Atlanta — Landmark Exhibition at VINSONart
location: VINSONart Gallery, Atlanta, GA
description: Anchor Atlanta art show running all summer — strong 'we should probably see this' energy, easy to fold into any weekend brunch date.

title: From Afrique, With Love — Artemus Jenkins Photo Exhibition
location: Old Rabbit Gallery, Atlanta, GA
description: Photography show rooted in African and African-diasporic storytelling — strong match for a thoughtful couples afternoon that ends in conversation.

title: The Art of the Game — Gallery Chimera (World Cup show)
location: Gallery Chimera, Atlanta, GA
description: Group exhibition inspired by the World Cup — visually loud, conversation-friendly, and an easy 45-minute stop before dinner.

title: Ink Studded Vegan Fest
location: 1879 S Stone Mountain Lithonia Rd, Lithonia, GA
description: Vegan food + tattoo pop-up combo — uncommon pairing, great if your date is the 'let's try something off-script' type.
